programme.title: The Bad Twin
programme.desc: (2016) Psychological thriller starring Haylie Duff. A radio host takes in her estranged sister's teenage twins, only to discover one of them harbours a dangerous dark side...

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: (1967) WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent.

programme.title: Dragon Eyes
programme.desc: (2012) Gritty action starring Cung Le and Jean-Claude Van Damme. Can a mysterious newcomer use his moral vision and fighting skills to save a neighbourhood terrorised by gangs and corrupt cops?

programme.title: Escape Plan 3
programme.desc: (2019) Action sequel with Sylvester Stallone. Ray Breslin is back behind bars in a Latvian cell-ebration of chaos - because rescuing billionaires' daughters is just part of his daily breakout routine.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: (1971) Western starring Charles Bronson and Ursula Andress. When a priceless golden sword is stolen, a rugged bodyguard and a samurai warrior join forces to take down the bandits.

programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: A Bride's Nightmare
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller with Brittany Underwood. On her wedding day, Leah is kidnapped by her fiancé's ex-girlfriend. But is it obsession, or a desperate attempt to protect her from a hidden danger?

programme.title: The Daughter Stalker
programme.desc: (2020) Twist-laden thriller with Karynn Moore. When her wealthy estranged sister dies, Carly is shocked to be named guardian of her daughter. But someone's plans didn't include a long-lost relative...

programme.title: The Wedding Stalker
programme.desc: A dressmaker longs to have a wedding of her own with the man of her dreams. And she will stop at nothing to have it - even if it means killing his bride to be.

programme.title: Another Mother
programme.desc: (2020) Psychological thriller with Alex McKenna. A woman gets engaged to a man with a young daughter, but their happiness is threatened by the girl's biological mother, who resorts to deadly measures.

programme.title: Dangerous Bestie
programme.desc: (2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: (2008) Mystery-thriller starring Lindsay Price. A woman inherits a family summer house haunted by a centuries-old curse, leading to a series of strange events that threaten her life.

programme.title: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: (2019) Disturbing thriller starring Cindy Busby. Alison thinks she's won the tenancy lottery when the seemingly perfect James moves into her basement. But some house rules are about to be broken...
